evals.prompt: I just updated OpenClaw to a new version — reconcile my config and tell me what new features to enable.
evals.expected_output: Reads the changelog between the old and new tags (git show NEW:CHANGELOG.md + git log) and release notes via docs-research, recommends new features as opt-in, flags deprecated/legacy settings, migrates openclaw.json with safeguards, then runs openclaw doctor --fix and reports what changed.
expectations: Distinguishes new features (opt-in) from deprecated/legacy (migrate) and breaking (must fix)
Runs openclaw doctor --fix and captures its output
Applies openclaw.json edits with diff/confirm/backup/validate safeguards

evals.prompt: Are there any legacy model refs in my config I should migrate after upgrading?
evals.expected_output: Identifies legacy refs (openai-codex/*, codex-cli/* → openai/*; claude-cli/* → canonical anthropic/* + runtime) and notes doctor --fix rewrites known ones automatically.
